title: Ask HN: Why is the HN crowd so anti-AI?
summary: 用户质疑Hacker News社区对AI的普遍反感态度，认为代码只是实现目的的手段，用户更关心产品功能而非代码来源。作者以20年软件工程师经验指出，AI辅助开发能大幅提升迭代速度，快速获取用户反馈并改进产品，强调执行速度比代码优雅更重要。
highlights: Users don’t care whether the code was written by AI or by hand, or which framework you used. They care that the product works.
By the time I manually ship version 1.0 of a product, the AI-assisted version could have been deployed 10x faster.
At some point, execution speed starts to matter more than the elegance of the code.
